title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
notes: Game changer. The 1% better every day concept completely shifted how I think about building habits.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
notes: Simple but profound. Wealth is what you don't spend. Best personal finance book I've read.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
notes: Convinced me to block distraction-free hours every morning. Hard to apply but very worth it.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
notes: Puts everything in perspective. The chapter on the Agricultural Revolution blew my mind.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
author: Mark Manson
notes: Good points but gets repetitive. The core message is solid though.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
notes: Dense but rewarding. System 1 vs System 2 is a framework I use daily.

title: Zero to One
author: Peter Thiel
notes: Contrarian and sharp. The secrets chapter is especially thought-provoking.

title: Man's Search for Meaning
author: Viktor Frankl
notes: One of the most important books I've ever read. Short but life-changing.

title: The Lean Startup
author: Eric Ries
notes: Essential reading for product work. Build-measure-learn loop is simple and effective.

title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius
notes: Read a few pages every morning. Timeless stoic wisdom that never gets old.

title: Shoe Dog
author: Phil Knight
notes: Honest and gripping. The Nike origin story is far messier and more human than I expected.

title: The Hard Thing About Hard Things
author: Ben Horowitz
notes: Raw and practical. No fluff — just real stories from someone who lived through it.

title: Build
author: Tony Fadell
notes: Really enjoying it so far. Great behind-the-scenes on the iPod and iPhone.

title: The Almanack of Naval Ravikant
author: Eric Jorgenson
notes: Recommended by a friend. On wealth and happiness.

title: The Mom Test
author: Rob Fitzpatrick
notes: Short read about how to talk to customers properly.

title: Never Split the Difference
author: Chris Voss
notes: Negotiation tactics from an FBI hostage negotiator.
